content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Thorough review of sync/import safety rules. Changes are correct, well-tested, and improve safety. Key improvements: (1) health checks now respect configured custom br binary paths via ProcessRunner::check_available trait method, (2) legacy pending mutation markers are explicitly rejected in owned-only flows because ownership cannot be proven, (3) health checks run before ownership checks for clearer error messages, (4) all production callers switched from sync_if_dirty_when_beads_healthy to sync_own_dirty_if_beads_healthy. No bugs, safety problems, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
